name: dotnet-doc-skills
description: C#/.NET documentation skills with Russian output. doc-cs: inline XML-doc comments per Microsoft recommended tags. doc-md: external Markdown docs (one .md per class, mirrors solution structure, cross-links). doc-db: reverse-engineers an Oracle relational schema purely from C# source. doc-folder: single in-place README.md overview of a multi-project folder (projects -> namespaces -> classes with per-class purpose/logic).
